scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w engine && npm run typecheck -w app
scripts.private:import-all: npm run private:preflight && npm run cards:import -- --input private-card-data/imperium_cards_private.csv --output generated-private/cards.normalized.json --report generated-private/card-import-report.json && npm run nations:import -- --cards generated-private/cards.normalized.json --input private-card-data/imperium_nations_private.csv --output generated-private/nations.normalized.json --report generated-private/nation-import-report.json && npm run rulesets:import -- --input private-card-data/imperium_nation_rulesets_private.csv --output generated-private/nation-rulesets.normalized.json --report generated-private/nation-ruleset-import-report.json && npm run strategy:import -- --input private-card-data/imperium_nation_strategy_private.csv --output generated-private/nation-strategy.normalized.json --report generated-private/nation-strategy-import-report.json && npm run bot-tables:import -- --input private-card-data/imperium_bot_state_tables_private.csv --output generated-private/bot-state-tables.normalized.json --report generated-private/bot-state-table-import-report.json && npm run bot-trade:import -- --input private-card-data/imperium_bot_trade_routes_private.csv --output generated-private/bot-trade-routes-tables.normalized.json --report generated-private/bot-trade-routes-table-import-report.json && npm run private:completeness
